_comment: Track manifest for the Pledge & Crown synthwave score. Each entry generates one WAV under assets/audio/<name>.wav. Stable Audio Open 1.0 outputs 44.1 kHz stereo. Seeds are pinned so re-runs reproduce; bump a seed if you want a fresh take. Edit prompts freely - re-run generate.py to overwrite.
_negative_prompt: vocals, voice, lyrics, singing, choir, speech, narration, low quality, distorted, muffled

tracks.name: title
tracks.prompt: retro 80s synthwave intro, slow swelling analog synth pads, gated reverb snare on the 2 and 4, bright neon arpeggio in C minor, sub bass, dreamy, John Carpenter inspired, instrumental, cinematic, 100 bpm, loopable

tracks.name: village
tracks.prompt: calm 80s synthwave village ambience, soft rolling analog pad, gentle chimes, soft DX7 bell hits, no drums or very light percussion, peaceful, evening, instrumental, 90 bpm, loopable, low intensity

tracks.name: mission_clear
tracks.prompt: short triumphant 80s synthwave sting, ascending bright synth lead, gated snare hit, tape stop ending, 4 seconds, instrumental, victorious, joyful

tracks.name: mission_locked
tracks.prompt: very short soft denial chime, two muted analog synth notes descending, low energy, 1 second, instrumental

tracks.name: editor_open
tracks.prompt: very short UI open sound, single bright analog synth swell, 1 second, instrumental, clean, retro 80s computer terminal aesthetic

tracks.name: epilogue
tracks.prompt: celebratory 80s synthwave finale, bright major key analog synth lead, lush layered pads, slow gated drums, sweeping arpeggio, soaring, instrumental, cinematic, 110 bpm, 20 seconds, end credits
